title: FiltPick
description: Enables you to pick up items selectively
body:
# Introduction

*"Only pick up what you need."*

Tired of picking up unwanted items like dirt and gravel while mining? FiltPick lets you selectively choose what gets picked up. It's lightweight and intuitive.

## Features

- ✨ **Two Filter Modes** - Blacklist (block junk) or Whitelist (allow only specific items)
- 🗑️ **Auto-Destroy Option** - Automatically destroy items you don't pick up
- 📊 **Real-time HUD** - See blocked items at a glance on your screen
- ⚙️ **Easy Setup** - Click to add/remove items, zero configuration needed
- 🎨 **Resource Pack Friendly** – Works with resource packs for filter screen
- 💎 **Friendly UI** - Clean, intuitive interface with customizable button positions

## Usage

### Pick Modes

- **Black-list mode**: Items in the list won't be picked up
- **White-list mode**: Only items in the list will be picked up

### Destruction Modes

- **Destruction-ON**: Unwanted items are automatically destroyed
- **Destruction-OFF**: Leave them on the ground

### Quick Add (v1.7.0+)
- Press **I** (configurable) while hovering over any item in your inventory to add it to the filter list instantly.

## Configuration (Optional - mc1.20.6+)

- **Filter List Size**: Edit `filtpick-server.toml` in `/config` (Fabric/NeoForge) or `/saves/<world>/serverconfig` (Forge)
- **Button Position**: Edit `filtpick-client.toml` in `/config`

## Feedback

Anyone can [create an issue](https://github.com/APeng215/FiltPick/issues/new) to report bugs, provide suggestions, or share feedback.
